ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "block_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each geographic block */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of population in the block */,
  "area" REAL /* Geographic area of the block */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the block */,
  "white_population" INTEGER /* Population of white individuals in the block */,
  "black_population" INTEGER /* Population of black individuals in the block */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the block belongs to */,
  "demographic_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic type (e.g., racial composition, population density) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_demographic_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_type_id") REFERENCES demographic_types ("demographic_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the region */,
  "total_area" REAL /* Total area of the region */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Overall population density of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "block_regions" (
  "block_id" TEXT /* ID of the block */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the block belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("block_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection event */,
  "block_id" TEXT /* ID of the block for which data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date of data collection */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collector (user who collected the data) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the collection process */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the data collection event */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_block_id FOREIGN KEY ("block_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("block_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collection_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_types" (
  "demographic_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date and time of account creation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
